---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the robotics runtime, tooling, or documentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Affected Area

- perception
- control
- firmware
- dashboard
- setup/calibration
- testing
- documentation

## Constraints

List any hardware, model, or performance constraints that matter.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, sketches, or reference behavior if helpful.
